name: Do I need a permit for a bathroom remodel, or is that only for big projects?

mainEntity.name: Do I need a permit for a bathroom remodel, or is that only for big projects?

acceptedAnswer.text: A permit is usually required if your remodel changes plumbing, electrical, ventilation, or structural elements, or if you enlarge the bathroom. Simple cosmetic updates like painting, swapping hardware, or replacing a mirror often do not require permits. In the San Francisco Bay Area, permit rules are enforced closely, so it is smart to confirm before work starts.
acceptedAnswer.description: You usually need a permit for plumbing, electrical, structural, or layout changes. Simple cosmetic updates often do not need one, but Bay Area cities tend to enforce permit rules closely.
